title: Intel471 (Deprecated)
description: The Intel471 connector (deprecated — use Intel471 V2) ingests STIX 2.1 objects from Intel 471's Titan cybercrime intelligence platform into OpenCTI. It runs four configurable streams: malware indicators, YARA rules, IOCs (URLs, domains, IPs, files), and CVE reports. Each stream produces structured STIX objects with relationships linking indicators to malware, observables, and vulnerability records.
short_description: Deprecated Intel471 connector that imports malware indicators, YARA rules, IOCs, and CVE reports from the Intel 471 Titan platform into OpenCTI. Use Intel471 V2 instead.
